title: Rishta Lentil Noodles Lebanese

seo.title: Rishta Lentil Noodles Lebanese: Easy Authentic Recipe
seo.metaDescription: Discover how to make authentic Rishta Lentil Noodles Lebanese! This hearty, flavorful Middle Eastern dish combines tender noodles with savory lentils. Get the easy recipe here!

seo.h1: Authentic Lebanese Rishta Lentil Noodles Recipe
h2Headings: What is Rishta Lentil Noodles Lebanese?
Pro Tips for the Best Results
seo.imageAlt: A bowl of authentic Lebanese Rishta Lentil Noodles, garnished with fresh cilantro and a drizzle of olive oil.
seo.imageCaption: Savor the rich flavors of Lebanon with this comforting bowl of Rishta Lentil Noodles, a perfect blend of hearty lentils and tender pasta.

description: Rishta Lentil Noodles Lebanese is a beloved, comforting dish from the heart of the Levant, featuring tender pasta squares simmered with earthy brown lentils in a fragrant garlic and cilantro broth. This hearty and wholesome meal offers a delightful texture contrast and a depth of flavor that warms the soul, making it a perfect family favorite. Traditionally garnished with caramelized onions, it is a true taste of home-cooked Middle Eastern cuisine.

ingredients.item: Small pasta squares or broken vermicelli

instructions.title: Prepare the Lentils
instructions.text: Rinse the brown lentils thoroughly under cold water. In a large pot, combine the rinsed lentils with 6 cups of water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for about 20 minutes, or until the lentils are tender but still hold their shape. Drain any excess water if necessary, reserving some lentil cooking liquid.

instructions.title: Sauté Aromatics
instructions.text: While the lentils cook, heat 3 tablespoons of olive oil in a separate large pan or pot over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and sauté for 8-10 minutes until softened and translucent, beginning to caramelize. Add the minced garlic and sauté for another 1-2 minutes until fragrant, being careful not to burn the garlic.

instructions.title: Combine and Simmer
instructions.text: Add the partially cooked lentils to the pan with the sautéed onions and garlic. Pour in the vegetable broth (or water) and add salt, black pepper, and ground cumin. Bring the mixture to a gentle boil, then reduce the heat to low and let it simmer for 5 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.

instructions.title: Add the Pasta
instructions.text: Stir in the small pasta squares or broken vermicelli noodles into the simmering lentil mixture. Cook for 8-10 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking, until the pasta is al dente and cooked through. If the mixture becomes too thick, add a little more hot water or reserved lentil cooking liquid.

instructions.title: Finish with Freshness
instructions.text: Remove the pot from the heat. Stir in the fresh lemon juice and most of the chopped fresh cilantro. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed for perfect balance.

instructions.title: Garnish and Serve
instructions.text: Ladle the hot Rishta Lentil Noodles into serving bowls. Garnish each bowl generously with the remaining fresh cilantro and a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil. For an authentic touch, serve with a side of extra lemon wedges and optional caramelized onions.

tips: For an extra layer of flavor and traditional presentation, consider frying thinly sliced onions in olive oil until deeply caramelized and crispy. These 'ta'leeyeh' are a cherished garnish for Rishta and other lentil dishes.

If you cant find small pasta squares, you can easily break up vermicelli or even thin spaghetti into 1-inch pieces. Ensure your lentils are cooked al dente before adding pasta to prevent the dish from becoming mushy.

Rishta Lentil Noodles taste even better the next day as the flavors deepen. Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3-4 days. Reheat gently on the stovetop, adding a splash of water or broth if needed to restore consistency.
article: Rishta Lentil Noodles Lebanese is a beloved Middle Eastern Pasta and Noodles dish enjoyed across Middle Eastern. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
